/CAL:MOTION TO RECALL SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/CTORD:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS RECALLED,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/X:COURT IMPOSESA CURFEW OF 5PM TO 8AM,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALLINSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:04-28-22 PRETRIAL CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:PRETRIAL/X:DEFENSE'S ORAL REQUEST MODIFY HOME DETENTION TO CURFEW ISGRANTED/X:THE PEOPLE DID NOT OBJECT TO THE REQUEST/CTORD: HOME DETENTIONIS MODIFIED TO CURFEW CONDITION,  HOME DETENTION IS DELETED, CURFEW HOURS FROM 7PM TO 7AM/GTWM/VD: 03-18-22 TRIAL DATE/VD: 04-04-22 LAST DAY/CONTD: FURTHER PRETRIAL 04-28-22/DOP/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 04-04-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TRIAL/DOPU:ACM/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER ANDRES MONDRAGON/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - PHOTO OF A GUN/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 2 - PHOTO OF GUN SERIAL NUMBER/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER GAVYN ROSS/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER ANDREW HIDALGO/WIT SWORN:SFPD SGT, TOM HAUSCARRIAGUE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 3 - PRINTOUT REGARDINGAFS RECORDS/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE ALLEGATION AT COUNTS 4 AND 5 FROM PC 25850(C)(2) TO PC 25850(C)(6),//X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNTS 4 AND 5 TO MISDEMEANORS PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) IS DENIED,/HTA1 1, 4, 5, 6, AND ENHANCING ALLEGATNS THERETO/X:THE MISDEMEANOR CHARGES AT COUNTS 2 AND 8 ARE CERTIFIED,/871D:3 AND 7/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACEDON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHA GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO,/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALLBE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS INPLACE,/WS/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON 02-02-22IN DEPARTMENT 22/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LD:01-20-22/NB/CONTD:SETTING OF PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/SA1:DIEGO HERNANDEZ/SAORD/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUTBAIL FILED IN COURT/
